description.value:
A heavy, wide-bladed two-handed sword built to stagger armored opponents and cleave through large enemies. Brutal and reliable, it is the weapon of front-line soldiers who need guaranteed stopping power.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d10, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d12, Stagger
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee d12, Stagger â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkCritical hit range becomes 19-20 when wielded two-handed. Against Large or larger creatures, this weapon deals 2d8 (or 2d10 two-handed) instead of d12 (or 2d8 two-handed).

rmeData.masterPerk: Critical hit range becomes 19-20 when wielded two-handed. Against Large or larger creatures, this weapon deals 2d8 (or 2d10 two-handed) instead of d12 (or 2d8 two-handed).
